query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "eva-bench: a new end-to-end framework for evaluating voice agents" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (d) and (f) as a foundational review and canonical reference for the domain of AI agent architectures and evaluation frameworks, which is the necessary background context for any specific follow-up work on voice agent benchmarks like EVA-Bench. It explicitly discusses the limitations of current benchmarks and proposes holistic evaluation metrics, directly addressing the "evaluation framework" component of the user's research question.
